lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: Do you want to buy any stone for building? Or gold leaf?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of stone do you sell?

lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: A few kinds. Limestone, of course. Here in Keldagrim we're surrounded by the stuff so I can practically give it away! You'll be able to build some kinds of furniture out of that.

lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: Marble is much better, of course, but it costs a lot for me to get hold of it. You can make some beautiful pieces of furniture out of that.

lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: I also sell gold leaf, which can be used to decorate furniture made of marble or mahogany.

lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: Then for the very special furniture I sell these magic stones. Only the most skilled builders can work them, but they can create a few amazing pieces of furniture with them.

lines.speaker: Stonemason
lines.text: So, do you want to buy anything?
